name: iptv-fleet
description: Multi-country IPTV site automation: slash commands, agents, and skills for managing the iptv-fleet monorepo.

plugins.name: iptv-fleet
plugins.description: Multi-country IPTV site automation. Bundles 4 slash commands (/iptv-status, /iptv-new, /iptv-deploy, /iptv-refresh-seo), 3 agents (writer, builder, auditor), and 3 skills (orchestrator, build-iptv-site, brand-logo-prompt).
